shots.title: Align embedding score thresholds + deduplicate constraints

hazards.description: Off-by-one: -lt 500 should be -le 500 for inclusive line cap — caught by architect review
enrich.ts still used old 0.55 primary threshold — inconsistent with calibration rationale, caught by architect review

bunker_locations: enrich.ts primary/related score tiers were inconsistent with context.ts default — always update all consumers when changing thresholds
Shell script arithmetic comparisons: -lt vs -le off-by-one — boundary values need explicit test or review
yardage_book_updates: context.ts default minScore: 0.55 → 0.4 (nomic-embed-text clusters relevant results at 0.45-0.55)
enrich.ts primary/related tiers: 0.55/0.4 → 0.4/0.3 (aligned with context.ts calibration)
prep.ts constraints: deduplicated against acceptance_criteria to avoid duplicate 'pnpm test passes'
embedding.ts SKIP_DIRS: added 'slope-loop' to exclude generated JSON, logs, scripts from index
run.sh: 500-line cap on semantic context injection, per-ticket timing, escalation reason logging
course_management_notes: All 4 tickets landed without reverts or test failures — clean execution
Architect review caught 2 warnings: enrich.ts threshold inconsistency and run.sh off-by-one — both fixed in follow-up commit
Pattern confirmed: review-discovered hazards continue to be the primary score inflator (S43-S48)
12 new tests added (10 embedding + 1 prep dedup + 1 enrich mock update), total suite: 2062 tests
Calibration sprint closed debt from S46-S47 embedding pipeline before next autonomous run
